description: Using QField, plan a coastal sensor deployment by updating the 'world_survey.gpkg' project. In the 'field_observations' layer, create a point named 'Sensor_JKT_North' exactly 0.1 degrees North of the Jakarta, Indonesia city center. Also create a point named 'Sensor_MNL_West' exactly 0.1 degrees West of the Manila, Philippines city center. Save all changes to the project file.
